description: Daily learning profile, favorite glyph, and practice record contract for Nebula Calligraphy.

fields.owner_user_id: Nebula Identity user id. MVP accepts explicit path value until Identity middleware is wired.
fields.style: Calligraphy style such as ou or yan.

fields.favorites: Favorite glyph list sorted by newest first.
fields.recent_practice: Recent practice records sorted by newest first.
fields.practice_count: Total practice record count retained by the MVP store.
fields.last_practiced_at: Most recent practice timestamp when present.

endpoints.POST /api/v1/calligraphy/users/{owner_us: Create or refresh a favorite glyph by glyph_id.
Record one practice action for a glyph and practice template.
